name: Saramonic Blink 500 B2+ 2-Person Wireless Clip-On Microphone System for Cameras and Mobile Devices
description: Bring hands-free and hassle-free wireless audio to your videos and content with the Saramonic Blink 500 B2+, an ultracompact and extraordinarily easy-to-use true wireless microphone system offering a cost-effective, all-inclusive solution for recording two subjects to cameras, computers, and mobile devices.

features.Key Features:: Influencers, Content Creators, YouTubers | 2 x Clip-On Transmitters with Omni Mics | Ultracompact 2-Channel Plug-In Receiver | 3.5mm Output, Lightning & USB Adapters | Plug & Play Operation, Headphone Jack | Adjustable Gain, Active Noise Cancelling | Built-In Rechargeable Batteries | Receiver 16 Hours, Transmitters 20 Hours | Charging Case for 41.6 Hours of Power | 492' Range, Full Set of Accessories
features.What’s in the box?: Saramonic Blink 500 B2+ 2-Person Wireless Clip-On Microphone System for Cameras and Mobile Devices (2.4 GHz) | 2 x Blink 500 B2+ Transmitter | Blink 500 B2+ Dual-Channel Receiver | 2 x Furry Windshield | 2 x Magnetic Mic Mount | Coiled 3.5mm TRS to TRS Output Cable | Coiled 3.5mm TRS to TRRS Output Cable | MFi Certified Lightning Adapter | USB-C Adapter | USB-A to USB-C Charging Cable | Charging Carry Case with 1250mAh Internal Battery | Drawstring Storage Pouch | Limited 2-Year Manufacturer Warranty
